_doc: Reference metrics for the sphere_sdf example. CI uses thresholds.* as perf-regression gates. Update this file when intentional changes shift a number; do NOT raise a threshold to make a failing test pass — find the regression first.
_role: smoke test / regression anchor (not a discovery tool); see docs/know-how/013-network-driven-development.md for layer definitions
config_summary: HashGrid n_levels=4 features_per_level=2 log2_hashmap=14, FullyFusedMLP n_neurons=16 hidden_layers=1, batch=4096, 50 steps, torch.manual_seed(42)

timing_ms._note: step 0 cold includes kernel-cache lookup; first step in fresh process can be 100-600 ms when no cache exists

memory_mb._note: majority is PyTorch (~150 MB) + Python interpreter; tmnn proper estimated < 40 MB

thresholds._doc: CI perf-regression gates. ~3-5x headroom over observed values to absorb variance without masking real regressions.
